title: sedum boehmeri
intro: Sedum boehmeri is a type of succulent plant belonging to the Crassulaceae family, commonly known as the stonecrop or orpine family. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of sedum boehmeri include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of sedum boehmeri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
